name: Co-operative Association of the Czech Republic (CACR)
description: CACR is a professional association of legal entities for discussing and dealing with common co-operative issues, for the protection, support and promotion of interests of co-operatives and their members. CACR is the apex, representing the interests of the co-operative system in relation to legislative and executive state bodies and the public.

name: Ekumenická akademie
description: Established in 1996 in the Czech Republic, Ecumenical Academy is an NGO with a vision of a socially just, sustainable and tolerant society. We work on human rights and finding solutions for economic, social, gender and ethnic inequalities. We support alternative forms of economical democracy, such as social solidarity economy (SSE), fair trade, cooperatives. We also organise campaigns and events to raise awareness of these issues. We are a founding member of many Czech social justice organisations and part of several international networks.. founded: 1996. scope: national. member of: RIPESS Europe
